title: salix × goerffyi
intro: Salix × goerffyi is a hybrid willow plant, specifically a cross between the Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, thanks to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × goerffyi include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, fever, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain.
